speaker: speaker2
text: I ’ m afraid I ’ m a poor talker . I ’ m not comfortable talking with the people whom I have just met for the first time . That is not very good for business , so I have been studying public speaking .

speaker: speaker1
text: Are you more of a leader or a follower ?

speaker: speaker2
text: I don ’ t try to lead people . I ’ d rather cooperate with everybody , and get the job done by working together .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you think you can make yourself easily understood in English ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , I like travelling . I am young , and unmarried . It ’ s no problem for me to travel frequently .
